item_specifications.material: High Density Gel Cooling Memory Foam Pad, 100% Waterproof Internal Case, Denim External Cover and Bonus Spare Cover

about_item: LUXURY LONG-LASTING DESIGN - This bed comes with 1x human-grade gel cooling memory foam pad, 1x waterproof internal zipper cover, 1x removable denim external zipper cover + 1x free bonus MicroSuede external case. Ideal for large to XL size or multiple medium dogs, the 47x29x4 inches pad can comfortably hold 100+ pounds of weight without flattening over time.

EASY TO CLEAN DURABLE DENIM COVER - Machine washable heavy-weight jeans denim cover in navy blue color can effortlessly retain 100+ wash cycles. The second layer of heavy-duty thick 100% waterproof case easily combats accidents and keeps your dog’s bed looking and smelling fresh and clean. The bonus spare MicroSuede second external cover is a great replacement while cleaning the denim cover. Environment eco-friendly with OEKO-TEK certified.

TRUE 100% ORTHOPEDIC MEMORY FOAM DOG BED - Unlike other lower-cost multi-layer partial or low-density memory foam offered by others, we do not cut corners and only offer 3.4 lbs of high-density solid gel cooling memory foam similar to high-end human therapeutic mattress stores to promote deeper sleep and healthy joint for many years to come.

SUPERIOR HUMAN GRADE MATERIALS - Better than your average human-grade mattress with conforming therapeutic comfort to reduce joint pain (arthritis) and improve health, mobility, & energy. The pad will not flatten overtime to contour your dog's figure and improve body alignment. Not Suitable for pets with severe destructive chewing behavior.

GIFT THE BEST - Full layer of true high-density therapeutic grade memory foam + heavyweight waterproof cover with 1x durable denim external cover + 1x bonus external cover, best quality construction, and smart features providing many years of comfort and support with excellent value for your money. Try it yourself and you will love it too. This bed also fits into an XL 48x30 or 30x48 inches dog crate.

summary.text: Customers find this dog bed to be of high quality and appreciate its durability, noting it holds up well in the wash and has no signs of wear. The bed is comfortable, easy to clean and vacuum, and features a waterproof cover. Customers describe it as soft with a stable mattress that's not stiff in the morning, and find it spacious enough for large dogs to play and sprawl out. They consider it worth the price.

authors_reviews.title: BEST dog bed you can buy. Your dog deserves this bed!
authors_reviews.text: The BEST dog bed you can buy.... I bought one bed for my Great Pyrenees puppy. He is still potty training so I wanted a bed that was truly waterproof. He is currently 45lbs but will probably be around 110-115lbs fully grown. This bed will accommodate him as he grows.My first impression when opening the packaging was 'This bed is PERFECT - EXACTLY what I wanted!'. The bed is made with premium quality memory foam that is 4" thick! It has a separate, waterproof covering that protects the foam. In addition, it comes with 2 outer covers, one is a thick denim, the second is a lighter weight micro suede cover that has a non-slip backing. ALL covers are durably constructed with heavy duty zippers. When I opened the first bed, I was so impressed with the overall quality that I went online and order a second bed AND a larger sofa style bed. The size of the bed I ordered fits perfectly in his crate but also looks great in my living room. I put the second bed in my bedroom. Easy to put everything together. Be sure to let the foam expand naturally and read the instructions.The memory foam and separate waterproof cover are game changers!!!!!! No more trying to figure out how to clean, disinfect, deodorize the foam if liquid leaks through the cover (you know what I mean :) ). The memory foam is STURDY, comfortable and sooooo much better than the egg carton orthopedic foam I have purchased in the past. I tried the bed and would sleep on it myself.I went to a national chain pet store (for something else) and looked at their beds. They were selling beds for twice the price and much lesser quality that will not last. They were constructed with either the egg carton 'orthopedic' foam or shredded stuff. I envision these beds lasting for several years without the foam flattening. You can purchase additional covers. The beds come in several different sizes and cover options. This is a quality product at a tremendous price made by an amazing small business, Dogbed4Less! I am so impressed, I will be gifting a couple beds to friends - every dog deserves a bed like this! I can't say enough good about these dog beds.
authors_reviews.author: maw5361

authors_reviews.title: Hands down, this is the best purchase for my German Shepherds!
authors_reviews.text: I don't leave many reviews, but this bed is worth the time. I have 2 male Shepherd brothers who's past time is literally destroying anything they've come in contact with. I was all set to spend twice the cost on the famous "almost indestructible beds" when I happened across this one. Mind you, I typically have to pay double for 2 of everything, so I was still skeptical even after reading rave reviews on Amazon. My dogs have already plowed, beaten or chewed their way through 6 beds. Upon arrival, the first thing I noticed was the quality of this memory foam compared to others as well as its thickness. The sheer weight of the denim cover was at least 3 times heavier than others I've purchased. The cover is snug, but roomy enough, so say goodbye to struggling with those tight zippers that break from mattress bulge. The zipper pull is made of larger heavy metal for ease and is still easily tucked in upon the end of close so my pups can't find it. The extra sewn band of fabric on the cover comes over the zippered area to conceal the zipper edge. Once installed in the crate, my pups are clueless where to find it. This item comes with 3 covers. One heavy denim, one waterproof, and one extra with non skid bottom for laundry day. Speaking of washing. I've washed 3 times and dried on low and covers look amazing. The dogs go in the crates for sleep only, I noticed the 1st week how comfortable and how well they slept over our baby cam. I'm now ready to take 2 more oversized ruined dog beds out of my living room and replace with 2 more of these. I never would have thought that we'd finally find beds that checked all the boxes like this product did. Lastly, I'd like to thank the sellers of this amazing bed. My German Shepherds (Thor & Loki) thank you too! 😊
authors_reviews.author: hae

authors_reviews.title: Best dog bed at a reasonable price
authors_reviews.text: Other “orthopedic” dog beds are made from cheap egg crate foam that flattens over time. However, after a couple months of having this bed for my dogs, it still holds up strong and is extremely comfortable. It’s so comfortable, that one of my dogs that usually doesn’t use beds loves it and won’t use any other dog bed we have. Even my cat uses it. The waterproof cover allows for easy cleaning, is very durable, and offers great protection for the foam from dog nails. In my opinion this is the best dog bed out there that is not heavily overpriced.
authors_reviews.author: Val R

other_countries_reviews.title: Extremely happy
other_countries_reviews.text: Very pleased with this product and the fact it came with a waterproof mattress cover and 2 other covers as well at no extra cost.It came much quicker than there delivery date.
other_countries_reviews.author: mrs sue webster

other_countries_reviews.title: My GSD puppy loves it
other_countries_reviews.text: My puppy is definitely a big fan of the bed. Even her naps are longer with the bed.
other_countries_reviews.author: HJ

other_countries_reviews.title: Bailey approves
other_countries_reviews.text: Our 10 year old Golden Retriever Bailey got on her new bed as soon as we unpacked it. The cushiony foam seems to be helping with the pain (arthritis) in her back legs.
other_countries_reviews.author: sandro

other_countries_reviews.title: My dog loves this bed.
other_countries_reviews.text: He's so comfortable and happy lying on it that I am going to order another one for the living room.
other_countries_reviews.author: Anthea Then

other_countries_reviews.title: I think it's great. My dog is taking a little longer to warm up to it. :)
other_countries_reviews.text: It was exactly what I was looking for and fits my kennel perfectly. My cat approved of it immediately and keeps hogging it. I hardly had a chance to try it out myself.My dog is more stubborn. He doesn't like change. He got on a couple of times but wouldn't stay, and then he boycotted it for a few days. His old ratty kennel mattress was all thin and flat, and you could feel the bottom of the kennel through it in several places. He sometimes has back/nerve issues, so I wanted him to be as comfortable as I am on my own gel memory foam mattress. But he preferred the soft, furry feel of the old bed. I put the denim cover on this new one (see note below).I first tried a blanket on top to entice him, which seemed to help temporarily, but it would bunch all up. Then I found an old flannel sheet, folded it up, and secured it down around the edges, between the mattress and the kennel walls. He's now in there conked out, looking comfortable, and choosing to go in without me coaxing/begging him.So I think it was the combination of getting used to the different feel of the bed and the denim cover that he didn't care for.A couple of very minor complaints:1. The micro-suede cover that comes with it is VERY thin. I had planned to use this rather than the denim one because I thought my dog would prefer it, but I think it wouldn't be long before he'd rip it with his nails.2. The mattress came stained on one side, but I don't think it was a gross stain (like pee or something - at least I hope not, LOL). The heavy plastic it wrapped in was ripped open at the top and that's where the stain was - a good size one. I tried to wash it a bit with soap and detergent and got some of it out. It's not something I will knock it down a star for, but I would have preferred it not to have a stain for what I paid.
other_countries_reviews.author: Lisa & Greyson
